text:
No results were returned for the exact title search. Combined with the automated checker findings — the arXiv ID 2406.13163 points to a completely different paper ("LLMatDesign: Autonomous Materials Discovery with Large Language Models") with entirely different authors — this reference is fabricated.

VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: No web page with the exact title "Swissprot-aug: Augmenting protein function descriptions for language model training" was found. The cited arXiv ID (2406.13163) belongs to a completely unrelated paper with different title and authors, and the paper was not found in any academic database.
LINK: NONE
